title: dendranthema nubigenum
intro: Dendranthema nubigenum, also known as Himalayan daisy, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the Himalayas. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dendranthema nubigenum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Dendranthema nubigenum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications of the plant's leaves and flowers.
